display.purpose: Sidebar logo only. Never used elsewhere.

title.purpose: Section heading, card heading, dialog title.

body.purpose: Default text. Table cells. Form values.

caption.purpose: Metadata under a record, hint text under a field.

label.purpose: Table column headers, sidebar section labels, eyebrows.

pill.purpose: Status badges, count chips. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Inputs and outline buttons at rest. Nearly invisible interactive hint.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Cards. Single quiet pixel of depth.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Lime focus indicator on every interactive element.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Standard state transitions — hover color shift, focus border shift.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Longer transitions — drawers, sheets, page transitions.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Easing for larger movements (drawer slide, sheet enter).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default call-to-action. Coal fill, white text, 6px radius. Used sparingly — one primary action per view.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary { background: #171717; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #171717; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2e2e2e; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px hsl(73 100% 50% / 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. White fill, Mist border, faint shadow. Used for non-primary actions and dialog Cancel.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline { background: #ffffff; color: #1a1c20; border: 1px solid #e6e6e6; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px hsl(73 100% 50% / 0.5); border-color: #c8ff00; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Default text field. 1px Mist border, faint shadow, lime focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 6px 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1c20; border: 1px solid #e6e6e6; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #737373; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #c8ff00; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px hsl(73 100% 50% / 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Detail card. 6px radius (NOT shadcn's default 12px), 1px Mist border, faint shadow. Compact internal padding.
components.html:
Order #84211
NEW
CustomerJane Smith
Total£142.00
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e6e6e6; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1a1c20; max-width: 380px; } .ds-card-head { padding: 18px 22px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e6e6e6; display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 18px 22px; } .ds-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 9px 0; font-size: 13px; } .ds-row + .ds-row { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } .ds-label { color: #737373; } .ds-value { font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-pill-new { background: #c8ff00; color: #141414; }

components.name: Status Pill — New
components.description: Highest-attention status. Lime fill, near-black text. The loudest signal in the system.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-pill-new { background: #c8ff00; color: #141414; }

components.name: Status Pill — Stuck
components.description: Urgent alarm state. Solid red fill, white text. Operator action required.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-pill-stuck { background: #ef4444; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Status Pill — Delivered
components.description: Quietest status. Light grey fill, muted grey text. Done — deliberately peripheral.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-pill-delivered { background: #f0f0f0; color: #737373; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Active navigation row. Prepended with a 6px lime dot — the signature mark of the system.
components.html: OrdersUsers
components.css: .ds-nav { width: 220px; background: #fafafa; padding: 14px; border-right: 1px solid #e3e5ea; font-family: 'Barlow', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 4px; color: #1a1c20; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: rgba(26, 28, 32, 0.05); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item-active::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #c8ff00; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview: This is the operator's room, not the storefront. The STREET marketplace brand is streetwear and skate-loud — uppercase Hanson, lime green, brutalist confidence — but the admin portal carries that brand the way a stagehand wears black: present, professional, out of the way. The team lives in this surface for six hours a day; brand expression here would be costume, not character. The system is a single light-mode surface, near-white on white with a hand-tuned greyscale, and one signal color: lime hsl(73 100% 50%). Lime is reserved for active state, focus rings, the New status, and the sidebar's active-nav indicator — never for decoration. Surfaces and chrome are quiet so the data can speak.
keyCharacteristics: One light theme, no toggle. No dark mode, no preferences for visual chrome.
Lime is signal, not skin. Reserved color used on roughly ≤8% of any screen.
Information density without enterprise punishment. Comfortable rows, deliberate whitespace.
Speed of investigation over delight. The tool earns its place by making finding faster.
Brand stamped, not shouted. Hanson appears only on the sidebar logo.

rules.name: The Lime-Is-Signal Rule
rules.body: Lime is never decorative. It appears as: the active sidebar dot, the New status pill, the 3px focus ring on inputs and buttons, chart-1, and nowhere else by default.

rules.name: The ≤8% Rule
rules.body: Across any single screen, lime should cover roughly 8% or less of pixel area at rest.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: Use Ink (#1a1c20) for text and Coal (#171717) for primary fills. Never #000. Pure black on a pure-white admin surface produces a vibrating, fatiguing read on long sessions.

rules.name: The Status Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Status color = urgency rank. From loudest to quietest: Stuck > New > Pending > Cancelled > Delivered.

rules.name: The Hanson-Once Rule
rules.body: Hanson appears exactly once per page — in the sidebar logo. Anywhere else is brand cosplay. The dead helper classes .street-title and .street-body-title from src/index.css should be deleted; they violate this rule.

rules.name: The Tabular-Nums Rule
rules.body: Every column of numbers gets font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Order totals, order IDs, counts, durations, timestamps.

rules.name: The All-Caps-Pills Rule
rules.body: Status pills are always uppercase, regardless of state. Hierarchy comes from fill color, not from letter case.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Use Mist Border, not a shadow, to separate adjacent surfaces.

rules.name: The Lime-Ring Rule
rules.body: The focus indicator is always the lime ring at 3px, 50% opacity. Never use a generic blue browser default.

dos: Do use lime only for active state, focus ring, New status, and chart-1. Never for primary buttons, never for decoration, never as a gradient.
Do keep total lime coverage at or under roughly 8% of any single screen at rest.
Do use 6px radius on buttons, inputs, and cards. Override shadcn's Card default of rounded-xl to match.
Do use tabular-nums on every numeric column — totals, IDs, counts, durations.
Do UPPERCASE every status pill, every label, every section heading in the sidebar.
Do keep Hanson to the sidebar logo only.
Do prefer 1px borders + greyscale shifts (Paper → Ash → Mist) over shadows to separate regions.
Do use the 3px lime focus ring on every interactive element. Never the browser default.
Do put the active sidebar dot at 6px solid lime. It is the signature mark of the system.
donts: Don't ship dark mode, a theme toggle, or any visual-chrome user preference. One surface, one theme.
Don't use Hanson outside the sidebar logo. Delete the dead .street-title / .street-body-title helper classes.
Don't use #000 or #fff literals. Always Ink/Coal/Paper from the token table.
Don't look like a generic SaaS admin template — cream cards, gradient buttons, hero-metric tiles, pastel category icons.
Don't look like an enterprise-heavy admin — thirty-column tables, no whitespace, modals on modals.
Don't look like a consumer-app cheerful product — rounded-everything, illustrations, emojis as state indicators.
Don't go brutalist-loud — uppercase Hanson on every heading, oversized type, lime backgrounds, marketing-page energy.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient). Forbidden everywhere.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use identical card grids — same-sized icon-heading-text cards repeated endlessly.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width/height/padding/margin). Animate transform/opacity only. 300ms ceiling on any transition.
Don't reach for a modal as the first thought. Try inline editing, drawers, or a row-expand first.
Don't add a new status pill variant without verifying it's distinguishable from the existing five at a glance in a tall list.
